strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement with GISCollective and testing libraries
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo), raising red flag for authenticity
Lack of explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key required stack components
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong open-source contributions, and direct AI-agent experience aligned with the role — but critical gaps in required stack (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin) and a serious inconsistency between resume name and candidate name raise substantial concerns about authenticity and readiness.
